en.title: Massive data: one-sentence summary
en.prompt: Based on the key features and unique characteristics of articles '@1' to '@3', please create an engaging and attractive sentence describing the [Topic] while accurately reflecting the original content from the articles.
en.remark: Craft promotional copy and title for your article. Excerpted from an article by Esor Huang.

metaDescription: Too much info? Create an engaging, accurate one-sentence summary of bulk text. Perfect for titles and promotional copy. Try it now.

faq.q: For the "one-sentence summary," what commonalities does the AI find?
faq.a: The AI tries to capture shared theme, unique angle, or related data across the three articles. Prerequisite: the three articles have an inherent connection. If they span different themes, the AI forces connections and the summary becomes hollow.

faq.q: Can I use it for marketing copy?
faq.a: Yes. Use ID 238 to paste competitor marketing content, then ID 239 to have the AI extract "industry consensus" and "shared selling points," then ask it to write differentiated copy based on that. This three-step approach beats asking for copy directly.
